docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCAFEE ALFRED AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS JIMMIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCAFEE ALFRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HICKS JIMMIE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS JIMMIE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HICKS JIMMIE HEARING SET FOR DEC-23-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-23-1991, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-13-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-27-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS JIMMIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
